title: Global Events
description: Random world-changing events keep minecraft fresh. Meteor strikes, Blood Moons, wandering caravans with exclusive loot, and Golden Hours with doubled ore drops — something always happens.
body:
Your world is never the same twice.
World Events adds random, world-changing events that fire every ~20 minutes — keeping every play session unpredictable and exciting. Whether you're mining, building, or exploring, something is always about to happen.

Meteor Strike
A meteor crashes near a random player, carving a crater into the terrain and leaving rare ores at the bottom — diamonds, gold, and even ancient debris. You'll hear the impact from miles away.

Blood Moon
The moon rises blood red. All night long, waves of hostile mobs spawn near every player. Prepare your defenses before dusk — or pay the price.

Wandering Caravan
A group of special merchants arrives near a player carrying exclusive items you can't get anywhere else — Elytras, Nether Stars, Totems of Undying, and more. They won't stay long. 

Golden Hour
For 5 minutes, all ore drops are doubled and every player receives Haste II. A countdown warns you when it's almost over. Mine fast.

Compatibility
✅ Multiplayer & server compatible
✅ Works alongside other mods
✅ No client-side install required for servers
